description_long: This is a modern front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a smooth, white exterior. The front features a large circular black door with a transparent window, allowing a partial view of the drum inside. Above the door is a control panel with a rotary dial, several buttons, and a digital display, all clearly labeled for various washing functions. The sides of the machine are plain with subtle recessed paneling, while the back is featureless and flat. The lower front section includes a small access panel, likely for maintenance or drainage. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in urban homes, laundromats, or utility rooms.
description: A sleek, white front-loading washing machine with a large black door, digital control panel, and smooth, modern exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular door, transparent window, control panel with dial, buttons, digital display, and a small lower access panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, white surface with recessed rectangular paneling and no visible controls or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, featureless white surface with no visible components or access points.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with plain white surface and recessed paneling, no controls or openings visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a central rotary dial, several push buttons, a digital display, and clearly labeled program options.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular porthole door made of black plastic with a transparent glass window and an integrated handle.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: To the left of the control panel, a horizontal slot likely serves as the detergent drawer, integrated seamlessly into the top front section.
